data.description:
## Why
The coach's move catalog must offer the right remediation. Two dso lessons need moves: pre-existing
issues should become follow-on tickets (pairs with rebar's discovered_from), and change-detector tests
must be DELETED, not re-pinned to new source text.

## What
Add two Pass-4 coach moves (moves.py + code_review_moves): file-follow-on-ticket (subject = the
pre-existing issue; guidance to create a discovered_from ticket) and delete-bad-test (subject = the
change-detector/tautological test; guidance to delete, not re-pin). Deterministic templates, gated by
applies_when tags; the LLM only picks the move and names the subject.

## Scope
src/rebar/llm/code_review/moves.py and the coach template set; no verdict-path change.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] file-follow-on-ticket and delete-bad-test moves exist with deterministic templates.
- [ ] Moves are gated by appropriate applies_when tags and pass subject validation.
- [ ] A change-detector-test finding maps to delete-bad-test, not an 'improve the test' move.
data.title: Coach moves: file-follow-on-ticket + delete-bad-test
